## Inspector ID

`object_field_string_length`

## Purpose

Report the observed min and max length of string fields.

## Usage

Inspectors take no configuration; they emit evidence — counts and distributions — for the reader to judge. Run this one over a corpus:

```
katalyst inspect <path> --inspector object_field_string_length
```
